title: Border Makeover
description: Gives the minecraft world border a new look, with several styles to choose from! More to be added over time. 9 Currently + 2 Alts.
body:
Check Gallary for the previews of the diffrent styles.

> Check which style your downloading to ensure it's the one you want.

> Should work for pretty much every version even if not specified. However, If a backport is required, your welcome to ask.

Really like how 3, 8, and 9 turned out! Give them a try o/
